mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, question_id, subject_id, topic_id, first_wrong_at, last_wrong_at, wrong_count, last_session_id, resolved, create_time, update_time FROM wrong_book_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_book_item (user_id, question_id, subject_id, topic_id, first_wrong_at, last_wrong_at, wrong_count, last_session_id, resolved) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{subjectId}, #{topicId}, #{firstWrongAt}, #{lastWrongAt}, #{wrongCount}, #{lastSessionId}, #{resolved})
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_book_item SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, topic_id = #{topicId}, first_wrong_at = #{firstWrongAt}, last_wrong_at = #{lastWrongAt}, wrong_count = #{wrongCount}, last_session_id = #{lastSessionId}, resolved = #{resolved} WHERE id = #{id}
